title: Explicit heat grid total is preserved under zero-gradient boundary equalities

source.citation: Randall J. LeVeque, Finite Difference Methods for Ordinary and Partial Differential Equations, SIAM, 2007, Ch. 9.
source.notes: Generated from checked Lean ground truth; source repository withheld during public release.

informal.statement: If both boundary gradients vanish, then the total of the shifted heat grid update equals the original interior total.
assumptions: r is a real diffusion number
u is a real-valued grid state on natural-number indices
n is a natural-number range length
informal.expected_conclusion: The heat grid total is preserved under zero-gradient boundary equalities.

declarations.name: heatInteriorTotal
declarations.statement: def heatInteriorTotal (u : Nat -> Real) (n : Nat) : Real := Finset.sum (Finset.range n) (fun i => u (i + 1))

declarations.name: heatStepGridTotal
declarations.statement: def heatStepGridTotal (r : Real) (u : Nat -> Real) (n : Nat) : Real := Finset.sum (Finset.range n) (fun i => heatStepGrid r u i)

declarations.name: heatBoundaryTerm
declarations.statement: def heatBoundaryTerm (u : Nat -> Real) (n : Nat) : Real := u 0 - u 1 + (u (n + 1) - u n)

declarations.name: heatStepGridTotal_of_neumann_boundary
declarations.statement: theorem heatStepGridTotal_of_neumann_boundary (r : Real) (u : Nat -> Real) (n : Nat) (hLeft : u 0 = u 1) (hRight : u (n + 1) = u n) : heatStepGridTotal r u n = heatInteriorTotal u n

tasks.input: Translate this explicit heat-equation total-balance theorem into Lean 4: If both boundary gradients vanish, then the total of the shifted heat grid update equals the original interior total.
tasks.target: theorem heatStepGridTotal_of_neumann_boundary (r : Real) (u : Nat -> Real) (n : Nat) (hLeft : u 0 = u 1) (hRight : u (n + 1) = u n) : heatStepGridTotal r u n = heatInteriorTotal u n

tasks.input: Given the heat-equation scaffold definitions and theorem statement, complete the Lean 4 proof.
tasks.target: A proof combining heatBoundaryTerm_eq_zero_of_neumann with heatStepGridTotal_of_boundary_zero.

tasks.input: Find the two LeanNumerics theorems combined to prove heat total preservation under Neumann boundary equalities.
